headline: KFC® Drops Their First Single, "Finger Lickin' Machine"
summary: Jingles had a good run. Now, KFC is doing something different.

headline: McDonald’s CEO Responds to the Viral Big Arch Backlash
summary: After going viral with his Big Arch bite, McDonald’s CEO Chris Kempczinski sits down for an exclusive interview with WSJ to discuss menu strategy, affordability concerns, and what his company reveals about today’s cautious consumer.

raw.headline: McDonald’s CEO Responds to the Viral Big Arch Backlash
raw.summary: After going viral with his Big Arch bite, McDonald’s CEO Chris Kempczinski sits down for an exclusive interview with WSJ to discuss menu strategy, affordability concerns, and what his company reveals about today’s cautious consumer.

headline: One Fast-Food Titan Rewards Investors and One Leaves Them Hungry
summary: Restaurant Brands International (NYSE: QSR) and Yum! Brands (NYSE: YUM) are the two most direct comparisons in franchised fast food, but for a retirement-focused investor deciding between them right now, only one makes a compelling case across the dimensions that matter most: valuation, income, and long-term price performance. Valuation On a forward earnings basis, Restaurant ... One Fast-Food Titan Rewards Investors and One Leaves Them Hungry
